features: Multi-Effect 7 Days Face Mask Set: This kit includes 7 masks with natural ingredients—Aloe Green Tea Honey VC Avocado Pomegranate Coffee. Each mask targets different skin concerns, offers deep hydration and radiance, make every day a different experience

Biodegradable Mask Sheet: Made from 100% pure cotton, the mask sheet is biodegradable and gentle on the skin. It is designed with the right thickness to comfortably adhere to the face, ensuring it holds rich essence for effective absorption

Indulge in Skincare Routine: Perfect as pamper gifts for women or party and birthday gifts for teenage girls and kids. Each mask delivers a soothing and rejuvenating experience, making it a delightful addition to any self-care routine, for all ages

Skin-friendly Formula: Whatever your skin type—dry combination or acne-prone, the sheet masks are your best choice. Free from alcohol and parabens, they are suitable for all skin types. The gentle formula nourishes your skin without causing irritation

Viral On Social Media: Loved by influencers and skincare enthusiasts, these sheet masks are a must-have. Share your glow and join the trend taking social media by storm. Experience the buzz and discover why everyone is raving about these fabulous masks

product_details_tab_data.Recommended Uses: After cleansing and toning, unfold a single sheet and gently spread over face avoiding the eye and mouth areas. Leave on for 10-15 minutes and remove mask, gently patting remaining serum until it is fully absorbed.
product_details_tab_data.Product Benefit: Hydrating, Hypoallergenic, Moisturizing, Radiant Skin, Rejuvenating, Brightening
product_details_tab_data.Ingredients: MAIN INGREDIENTS: ALOE BARBADENSIS EXTRACT, BUTYROSPERMUM PARKII (SHEA) BUTTER, COFFEA ARABICA (COFFEE) SEED EXTRACT, HONEY EXTRACT, LACTOBACILLUS/PUNICA GRANATUM FRUIT FERMENT EXTRACT, CITRUS LIMON (LEMON) FRUIT EXTRACT, CAMELLIA SINENSIS LEAF EXTRACT, SODIUM HYALURONATE CROSSPOLYMER, HYALURONIC ACID,SODIUM HYALURONATE, SODIUM ACETYLATED HYALURONATE, HYDROLYZED SODIUM HYALURONATE

product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: 1. Our products have a shelf life of 3 years, details of expiry dates can be found on the product packaging display. 2. Store it in a dry and cool place, avoid the direct sun exposure. 3. Please keep the mask away from children under 5 years old. 4. If any discomfort or allergic symptom occurs, please discontinue using immediately and consult a doctor if necessary.
